headline: Palantir Faces Burry Critique And UK Scrutiny As Anthropic Competition Grows
summary: Investor Michael Burry publicly reiterates a short position in Palantir Technologies, criticizing NasdaqGS:PLTR's premium AI valuation and highlighting Anthropic as a lower cost competitor. Anthropic ramps up its own AI offerings, adding pressure to Palantir's claim to a premium position in enterprise and government AI software. UK regulators and ethics bodies increase scrutiny of Palantir's government and healthcare contracts, raising questions about data privacy and long term contract...

As AI use grows across industries, analysts say one of these companies could see its value double. headline: The AI Bubble That Isn’t
summary: I’ve been watching the AI infrastructure buildout pretty much every quarter for the past two years now, and I keep coming back to the same question: is this a bubble, or is this something different? headline: Michael Burry: 'Anthropic is eating Palantir's lunch,' stock sinks
summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Palantir (PLTR) stock is sinking after "Big Short" investor Michael Burry said that Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is "eating Palantir's lunch" in a now-deleted X post. CoreWeave (CRWV) and Meta (META) expanded their deal to $21 billion. BlackBerry (BB) stock is surging on the company's strong quarterly results.

content.title: Michael Burry: 'Anthropic is eating Palantir's lunch,' stock sinks
content.description:
Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories.

Palantir (PLTR) stock is sinking after "Big Short" investor Michael Burry said that Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is "eating Palantir's lunch" in a now-deleted X post.

CoreWeave (CRWV) and Meta (META) expanded their deal to $21 billion.

BlackBerry (BB) stock is surging on the company's strong quarterly results.
content.summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Palantir (PLTR) stock is sinking after "Big Short" investor Michael Burry said that Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is "eating Palantir's lunch" in a now-deleted X post. CoreWeave (CRWV) and Meta (META) expanded their deal to $21 billion. BlackBerry (BB) stock is surging on the company's strong quarterly results.

headline: Is Palantir Technologies (PLTR) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?

headline: The Haters Are Back for Palantir Stock
summary: Palantir Technologies shares fell 8% Thursday and are on track for their lowest close in more than a month. Fears that newer artificial-intelligence technology will leave the data-analytics company in the dust have haunted Palantir over the past two months despite record revenue in the fourth quarter.
